keyword: automatic dog feeder for large breed 10l
title: Automatic Dog Feeder for Large Breeds (10L+ Capacity)
meta: High-capacity automatic feeders that handle big dogs and multi-day trips.
intro: Big dogs eat a lot. A 10L+ hopper means fewer refills and peace of mind on a weekend away.

sections.body: A 40lb dog eating 2 cups/day needs ~6L/week. Size the hopper to your trip length.
Larger kibble dispenses less precisely; weigh a few cycles.
A top-heavy feeder gets bumped by a big dog — look for a wide base.

faq.a: No — dry kibble only for hopper feeders.
Backup-battery models keep the schedule; others default to a fail-open or skip.
